languages.text: {n}Оставшиеся страницы дневника девственно чисты. Возможно, когитатор во дворце Даргонуса, упомянутый в последней записи, сможет поведать вам больше о таинственном Себериане фон Валанциусе и его жизненном пути.{/n}

{n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Оставшиеся страницы дневника девственно чисты. Возможно, когитатор во дворце Даргонуса, упомянутый в последней записи, сможет поведать вам больше о таинственном Себериане фон Валанциусе и его жизненном пути.{/n}

{n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}

languages.text: {n}日记本剩下的纸页完全没有被动过。也许最后一篇记录中提到的达戈努斯宫殿里的沉思者，能告诉你更多关于这位神秘的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的信息及其生平。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}日记本剩下的纸页完全没有被动过。也许最后一篇记录中提到的达戈努斯宫殿里的沉思者，能告诉你更多关于这位神秘的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的信息及其生平。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las páginas restantes del diario están intactas. Tal vez el cogitador del palacio de Dargonus que se menciona en la última entrada tenga más información sobre el misterioso Seberian von Valancius y sus viajes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las páginas restantes del diario están intactas. Tal vez el cogitador del palacio de Dargonus que se menciona en la última entrada tenga más información sobre el misterioso Seberian von Valancius y sus viajes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les pages restantes sont vierges. Le cogitateur du palais de Dargonus mentionné dans la dernière entrée vous en apprendra peut-être davantage sur ce mystérieux Seberian von Valancius et la vie qu'il a menée...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les pages restantes sont vierges. Le cogitateur du palais de Dargonus mentionné dans la dernière entrée vous en apprendra peut-être davantage sur ce mystérieux Seberian von Valancius et la vie qu'il a menée...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Günlüğün geri kalan sayfalarına hiç dokunulmamış. Belki de son girdide bahsedilen Dargonus sarayındaki kavramsayar, sana bu gizemli Seberian von Valancius ve onun hayat yolculuğu hakkında daha fazla şey anlatabilir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Günlüğün geri kalan sayfalarına hiç dokunulmamış. Belki de son girdide bahsedilen Dargonus sarayındaki kavramsayar, sana bu gizemli Seberian von Valancius ve onun hayat yolculuğu hakkında daha fazla şey anlatabilir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die übrigen Seiten des Tagebuchs sind unberührt. Vielleicht kann dir der im letzten Eintrag erwähnte Cogitator im Palast von Dargonus mehr über diesen geheimnisvollen Seberian von Valancius und die Reise seines Lebens erzählen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die übrigen Seiten des Tagebuchs sind unberührt. Vielleicht kann dir der im letzten Eintrag erwähnte Cogitator im Palast von Dargonus mehr über diesen geheimnisvollen Seberian von Valancius und die Reise seines Lebens erzählen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この日記の残りのページは全く触られていない。最後の書き込みに記されたドラゴヌスの宮殿の思考者なら、この謎めいたセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスとその人生についてもっと教えてくれるかもしれない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The remaining pages of the diary are utterly untouched. Perhaps the cogitator in the palace of Dargonus, mentioned in the last entry, can tell you more about this mysterious Seberian von Valancius and his life's journey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}この日記の残りのページは全く触られていない。最後の書き込みに記されたドラゴヌスの宮殿の思考者なら、この謎めいたセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスとその人生についてもっと教えてくれるかもしれない。{/n}
